name: office-keytips
title: Define KeyTips for ribbon controls
shortDescription: This sample shows how to define custom KeyTips for the ribbon controls of an Office Add-in.
longDescription: This sample shows how to define custom KeyTips for the ribbon controls of an Office Add-in.

references.name: Add custom KeyTips to your Office Add-ins
references.description: Learn how to add custom KeyTips, also known as sequential key shortcuts or access keys, to your Office Add-in.
